name: HRC_COMP_TEMPLATES_B
description: Defines a compare template for comparison which comprises of the comparison type (e.g. Benefit Medical Plans), highlights, footnotes, features and grouping of features.

columns.Name: TEMPLATE_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key column.

columns.Name: COMP_DEF_VAL_ID
columns.Comments: Specifies the template comparison definition value identifier. Foreign key to hrc_comp_def_vals.

columns.Name: IKEY
columns.Comments: Immutable key. Oracle internal use only.

columns.Name: DATE_FROM
columns.Comments: Indicates the date from the template is active.

columns.Name: DATE_TO
columns.Comments: Indicates the date the template is active to.

columns.Name: COMP_DEF_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: Specifies the template comparison definition type identifier. Foreign key to hrc_comp_def_types.

columns.Name: PRODUCT_CODE
columns.Comments: This column identifies the owning product.

columns.Name: LEGISLATION_CODE
columns.Comments: Foreign key to FND_TERRITORIES.

columns.Name: USE_GROUPS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Specifies if the template use groups Y or N.

columns.Name: USE_CAT_FLAG
columns.Comments: Specifies if the template use categories Y or N.

columns.Name: CAT_DEF_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: Specifies the category definition type identifier. Foreign key to hrc_comp_def_types_b.

columns.Name: USE_OPT_FLAG
columns.Comments: Specifies if the template use options Y or N.

columns.Name: OPT_DEF_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: Specifies the options definition type identifier. Foreign key to hrc_comp_def_types.

columns.Name: USE_HD_FLAG
columns.Comments: Specifies if the template uses header description  Y or N.

columns.Name: HD_TYPE
columns.Comments: Specifies the header description type to be used.

columns.Name: HD_CODE
columns.Comments: Specifies the header code to be used.

columns.Name: USE_SUGV_FLAG
columns.Comments: Specifies if the template use common suggestion values  Y or N.

columns.Name: SUGV_DEF_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: Specifies the common suggestion values  definition type identifier. Foreign key to hrc_comp_def_types.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_ENTERPRISES.

columns.Name: ATTR_CHAR1
columns.Comments: Additional column for storing characters.

columns.Name: ATTR_CHAR2
columns.Comments: Additional column for storing characters.

columns.Name: ATTR_CHAR3
columns.Comments: Additional column for storing characters.

columns.Name: ATTR_NUMBER1
columns.Comments: Additional column for storing a number.

columns.Name: ATTR_NUMBER2
columns.Comments: Additional column for storing a number.

columns.Name: ATTR_NUMBER3
columns.Comments: Additional column for storing a number.

columns.Name: ATTR_DATE1
columns.Comments: Additional column for storing a date.

columns.Name: ATTR_DATE2
columns.Comments: Additional column for storing a date.

columns.Name: ATTR_DATE3
columns.Comments: Additional column for storing a date.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: SGUID
columns.Comments: The seed global unique identifier. Oracle internal use only.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: MODULE_ID
columns.Comments: Seed Data Framework: indicates the module that owns the row. A module is an entry in Application Taxonomy such as a Logical Business Area. When the MODULE_ID column exists and the owner of the row is not specified, then the Seed Data Framework will not extract the row as seed data.

columns.Name: SEED_DATA_SOURCE
columns.Comments: Source of seed data record. A value of 'BULK_SEED_DATA_SCRIPT' indicates that record was bulk loaded. Otherwise, specifies the name of the seed data file.

columns.Name: ORA_SEED_SET1
columns.Comments: Oracle internal use only. Indicates the edition-based redefinition (EBR) context of the row for SET1. Context values are Y or N.

columns.Name: ORA_SEED_SET2
columns.Comments: Oracle internal use only. Indicates the edition-based redefinition (EBR) context of the row for SET2. Context values are Y or N.
